## What changed

Describe the user-visible result and why it belongs in RTLDeck.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test` (with a genuine OSS CAD Suite when backend behavior changes)
- [ ] I tested the affected beginner workflow manually
- [ ] I did not add generated packages, native toolchains, private HDL, or progress screenshots
- [ ] User-facing behavior and documentation are updated

## Scope and compatibility

Note any platform limitation, unsupported SystemVerilog construct, migration, or intentional deviation.
